title: Repository Structure — Health
description: Repository health snapshot from a single slopbrick scan. v3 (v0.15.0) replaces the legacy slopIndex/categoryScores pair with four orthogonal scores: aiQuality, engineeringHygiene, security, repositoryHealth. Legacy fields kept optional for backward compat; will be removed in v0.16.0.

aiQuality.description: v0.15.0: AI/agent-friendliness score (0-100, higher is better). How easily an LLM can navigate, refactor, and extend this codebase.

engineeringHygiene.description: v0.15.0: engineering hygiene score (0-100, higher is better). Code organization, naming, dead code, complexity, test coverage, type safety.

security.description: v0.15.0: security posture score (0-100, higher is better). Dependency vulnerabilities, secret leaks, OWASP anti-patterns.

repositoryHealth.description: v0.15.0: repository health composite (0-100, higher is better). The v3 replacement for the headline slopIndex. Weighted blend of the three scores above.

issueCounts.description: Number of issues per severity level.

slopIndex.description: DEPRECATED (v0.15.0). Legacy composite (0-100, lower is better). Kept optional for backward compat with v0.14 dashboards; will be removed in v0.16.0. New readers should ignore.

categoryScores.description: DEPRECATED (v0.15.0). Legacy per-category breakdown. Kept optional for backward compat; will be removed in v0.16.0.

constitutionDrift.description: Number of constitution violations detected in this scan.

topOffenseIds.description: Top 3 most-firing rule IDs in this scan, sorted by issue count desc.

scanDurationMs.description: How long the scan took in milliseconds.
